name: e2e-v2-continuation-ask
description: Record a valid generated nextFlowSpec as awaiting approval when continuation mode is ask.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_ASK_SOURCE and do not inspect or modify files.
